pages.title: Overview
pages.purpose: Introduction to the coin-exchange system, its purpose as a cryptocurrency trading platform, and high-level architecture overview

pages.title: Technology Stack
pages.purpose: Overview of the core technologies used: Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, Alibaba Cloud ecosystem, MyBatis-Plus, Redis, RocketMQ, etc.

pages.title: Multi-Module Architecture
pages.purpose: Explanation of the Maven multi-module structure and the purpose of each major module

pages.title: Infrastructure Layer (coin-iaas)
pages.purpose: Documentation of infrastructure services including API gateway, authentication, service discovery, and traffic control

pages.title: API Gateway
pages.purpose: Configuration and routing rules for the gateway-server, including path-based routing, service discovery, and Sentinel integration

pages.title: Authentication Service
pages.purpose: OAuth2-based authentication service configuration, security architecture, and token management

pages.title: Service Discovery with Nacos
pages.purpose: How services register with and discover each other via Nacos, including configuration management

pages.title: Common Components (coin-common)
pages.purpose: Shared utilities, constants, DTOs, and domain models used across all services

pages.title: System Constants
pages.purpose: Documentation of system-wide constants including Redis keys, configuration types, matching engine results, and channel names

pages.title: Common DTOs and Enums
pages.purpose: Shared data transfer objects and enumerations used for inter-service communication

pages.title: K-Line Data Models
pages.purpose: Candlestick chart data structures including CreateKLineDto, Line domain object, and KlineType enum with time intervals

pages.title: Order Book Depth Models
pages.purpose: Data structures for order book depth aggregation, merging strategies, and DepthMergeType enum

pages.title: Exchange Engine
pages.purpose: Core trading operations including market management, order processing, and trade execution

pages.title: Exchange Service Configuration
pages.purpose: Service configuration including Nacos integration, RocketMQ bindings, and message channels for order and trade processing

pages.title: Market Service
pages.purpose: Market configuration management including trading pairs, symbols, market data retrieval, and coin integration

pages.title: Market Service Feign Client
pages.purpose: Inter-service communication interface for accessing market data, depth data, and trade information from other services

pages.title: Exchange Message Channels
pages.purpose: RocketMQ message channels for order input, cancellation, and trade processing with Spring Cloud Stream

pages.title: Match Engine
pages.purpose: Order matching algorithms, order book management, and trade execution

pages.title: Match Service Configuration
pages.purpose: Configuration of the matching engine including symbol-specific settings (coinScale, baseCoinScale) and RocketMQ bindings

pages.title: Order Matching Flow
pages.purpose: How orders flow through the matching engine, order book management, and production of trade results

pages.title: Finance Service
pages.purpose: Account management, balance tracking, fund locking, and financial transaction processing

pages.title: Account Service
pages.purpose: User account operations including balance queries, fund locking, transfers, and account decreases

pages.title: Account REST API
pages.purpose: REST endpoints for account operations and Feign client implementation for inter-service calls

pages.title: Financial Transaction Types
pages.purpose: Different types of financial operations: locks, transfers, decreases, and their parameters

pages.title: Chain Service
pages.purpose: Blockchain integration and real-time data streaming via WebSocket for market updates

pages.title: Chain Service Configuration
pages.purpose: Service configuration including Nacos, RocketMQ, and T-IO WebSocket server setup

pages.title: WebSocket Server
pages.purpose: T-IO WebSocket server configuration, port settings, heartbeat timeout, and client connection management
